name: Leapsome
tagline: AI-powered people enablement platform for performance and learning
description: Leapsome is an all-in-one people enablement platform that uses AI to drive performance management, employee engagement, learning, and compensation. Its AI copilot helps write performance reviews, analyze survey results, set development goals, and create personalized learning paths. Leapsome connects the dots between engagement data, performance metrics, and business outcomes.
cons: Can be complex to set up
